title: Over-eager inference of distributed RAM for synth_xilinx
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Unpacked arrays (even a 1-bit one) is inferred into distributed RAM.
On ca469473.

`./yosys -p synth_xilinx dram.v -DUNPACKED`

```
module dram(input [3:0] i, output [4:0] o);
`ifdef UNPACKED
reg val [0:0];
`else
reg [0:0] val;
`endif
initial val[0] = 1'h1;
assign o = i + val[0];
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

Result of: `./yosys -p synth_xilinx dram.v`
```
   Number of cells:                 10
     LUT1                            1
     MUXCY                           4
     XORCY                           5
```

## Actual behavior

```
   Number of cells:                 12
     LUT2                            2
     MUXCY                           4
     RAM64X1D                        1
     XORCY                           5
```
